name: German Elderberry Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the elderberries and place them in a soup pot.
2. Add water and lemon rind, then cook until the berries are soft.
3. Strain the mixture into a bowl, pressing as much of the pulp through as possible.
4. Return the liquid to the pot and bring it to a boil.
5. Remove from heat and combine cornstarch, cold water, and lemon juice in a separate bowl (press out all lumps).
6. Add this mixture to the soup along with sugar, stirring thoroughly.
7. Place back over medium-low heat and cook, stirring constantly, until thick and clear.
8. Adjust sweetness and acidity to taste.
9. Serve hot or cold.
